name: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month tool
description: For HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month, unmonitored overtime causes compliance issues. We alert HR when overtime exceeds limits instead of manual tracking of timesheets and overtime calculations.
target_audience: HR operations in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month
problem_solved: Overtime management and compliance with labor laws
